signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), below market forecasts of 2.4%.** | NO | HIGH confidence[1]

This March figure—latest available as of early April 2026 updates—signals contained price pressures despite Middle East energy shocks, aligning with Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook (steady policy rate at 2.5% for 7th month, per April 10 announcement).[1][4]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: No Whale Bets, Smart Money Tips, or Mispriced Markets Confirmed in Real-Time Data | NO | HIGH confidence**

No Whale Bets, Smart Money Tips, or Mispriced Markets Confirmed in Real-Time Data | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results lack direct X posts from Polymarket traders on whales, tips, or mispriced markets like Nasdaq 24/7 trading; focus remains on high-volume geopolitical and tweet markets with no recent resolutions, announcements, or confirmed events shifting odds.[1][2][4]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume with 88% on 300-319 Tweets (Apr 10-17) | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Hits $13M Volume with 88% on 300-319 Tweets (Apr 10-17) | NO | MED confidence**  
Tweet Markets show "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" leading with 88% odds on 300-319 tweets and $13M volume across 22-28 active markets; traders on X likely buzzing over Musk's posting pace, but no confirmed mispricing calls or smart money moves in results.[4][3]
